titleStmt.title: SII 9.102: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 102. (A.R. No. 484 of 1914.) ON A SLAB SET UP NEAR THE MAIN ENTRANCE OF THE SOMALINGESVARA TEMPLE AT MAILARA, SAME TALUK AND DISTRICT.

summary.p: This is damaged and dated Śaka 968, Vyaya, Phālguṇa, śu. 3, Ādityavāra, Uttarābhādrapada, Sādhya-yōga corresponding to A.D. 1046, February 1, Sunday and refers itself to the reign of the Chālukya king Trailōkyamalladēva. It states that when the Mahāmaṇḍalēśvara [Gaṇḍarā]dityarasa was ruling Sindavāḍi thousand, the agrahāra Narugunda and Beṇṇeyūr, Pergaḍe Kāḷimayya or Kāḷidāsarasa washed the feet of Chillukāchārya, disciple of Tējōrāsi-Paṇḍita of Mēḻimaḍu and made a grant of some plots of land. two houses and a stall for the service of the gods Svayambhudēva and Mūlasthānadēva. It also records that the two hundred Mahājanas of the place should always appoint a celebate as the head of the temples and drive out a married man from the place, if ever appointed. The king is stated to have exempted the sale of salt, sugar and other three rasas from toll in the place. A fine of a paṇa for defaming, paṇas 6 for striking, paṇas 12 for causing blood and paṇas 8 for association with those who are given to plunder was also imposed. Nāgavāra composed the record, Nāgamma wrote and Chāvuṇḍōja engraved it. Dēka and Mēchika, brothers of Kāḷidāsa are also mentioned.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
ya traiḷōkyanāthāya svasti . samasta bhuvanāśra
ya śrīpṛthvīvallabha mahārājādhirāja paramēśvara paramabhaṭṭāraka satyāśrayakuḷatiḷakaṁ cāḷukyābharaṇaṁ śrīmattraiḷōkyamalladēva
ra vijayarājyābhivṛddhipravarddhamānamācandrārkkatāraṁbaraṁ saluttamire © vṛtta © ma lāḷamāḷavika
pāṇḍya dōrvvalamene ma danīma purāṇa baḷajaḷadhivaḷitabhūtaḷama(m)nuṇḍante sā
yaṇa paracakramallanripaṁ kāva ḷānēka nnāḷāpaṁ mi
darinripatigaḷaṁ dhāḷiṭṭu kolgumavanīpāḷaṁ traiḷōkyamallanāhavamallaṁ . tatpādapadmōpajīvi . svasti samadhigatapaṁ
camahāsabda mahāmaṇḍaḷēśvara madhyadēśādhipati . birudara gaṇḍa maṇḍa patnīgaṇḍa maṇḍalaṁ gōva
kya nāmādisamastaprasastisahitaṁ śrīmattraiḷōkyamalladēvara pādapaṁkajabhramaraṁ śrīmanmahāmaṇḍaḷēsvaraṁ
dityarasarssindavāḍi sāsiramumaṁ koḷagaynūṟumaṁ Agrahāra naṟugundamuṁ beṇneyūrppa
pratipāḷanadindamāḷdu sukhasaṁkathāvinōdadoḷire . nṛtta © caladidirāntarātigaḷa nā
bhujāsiyoḷoppire bīradēḷgayoḷ . palarggamudātta
Intenisida pratāpō
mentene © kanda © mitra
saṁrakṣaṇadoḷ pātramaṟidīvudāttaṁ dhātrige perggaḍetanamaṁ baḷayise
ratna patibrate yēcikabbegaṁ śrīvibhavaṁ puṭṭidanūrjjita kāḷidāsanī bhūvaḷayakke dāni
budhāḷi kīrtikuṁ bhāvikacakravartti nutakāryyabrihaspatiyaṁ Udayise vārppeseye
ṇamenipa peṁpumatyunnatiyaṁ ḷeyoḷu nidire maṁḍaḷāsi jitanajitaṁ . © gadya © Intu negaḻda sa
mastaguṇagaṇālaṁkṛtaṁ svasti samastarājyabharanirūpitamahāmātyapadavīvirājamānamānōnnataprabhumaṁtrōtsāhasakti
trayasaṁpannaṁ bandhujanāssrayanāśśritajanakaḷpavṛkṣa satyakānīnaṁ piridittumaṟevaṁ gōtrapavitraṁ sakkasāṟasamuddharaṇa
maṁtrimāṇikya nāmādisamastapraśastisahitaṁ śrīmanmahāmaṇḍaḷēśvaraṁ gaṇḍarādityarasara pādapaṁkajabhrama
raṁ śrīmatperggaḍe kāḷidāsayyaṁgaḷu sakavarṣa 968 neya vyayasaṁvatsaraṁ pravarttise tadvarṣābhyaṁta rada
phālguṇa suddha tadige Ādityavāramuṁ Uttarābhādrapade nakṣatramuṁ sādhyameṁba yōgamumāgi navaggrahaṁgaḷe
llamēkādasasthānadoḷ subhamuhūrttadoḷ yamaniyamasvādhyāyadhyānadhāraṇamaunānuṣṭhāna
japasamādhisaṁpannarappa śrīmat meḷimaḍuvina tējōrāsipaṇḍitara siṣyarappa cillukācāryyargge pādaprakṣāḷanō
sahiraṇyapūrvvakaṁ sadbhaktiyinde svayaṁbhudēvargga mūlasthānada dēvarggamanteraḍuṁ dēvālayaṁ sarvvanamasyaṁ māḍi beḷivaḷḷa
de mūḍaṇa disābhāgadoḷu Aḷedu koṭṭa keyi mattarirppattanālku mattamalliṁ mūḍal Ālagāvuṇḍana keṟeya keḷage
ti rkku gaṟdegamendaḷedu koṭṭa nelaṁ mattareraḍu sarvabādhāparihārameṁdu koṭṭa mane Eraḍu Aṁgaḍi Ondu Intīdharmmamam pratipāḻi
davargge śrībāṇarāsiyoḷ sahasrāsvamēdhamiḻdu sāsirakavileya kōḍuṁ koḷagumaṁ paṁcaratnadiṁ kaṭṭisi sāsirbba
brāhmaṇarggaṁ tapōdhanarkkaṁ mahādānaṁgeyda puṇyamuṁ yasamumakkuṁ Anyāyadiṁdī dharmmavanaḷidavargge mahāpuṇyatī
rtthaṁgaḷoḷ gōbrāhmaṇarumaṁ tapōdhanarumaṁ strībāḷakarumaṁ kondha paṁcamahāpātakarappar . ślōkaṁ . bahubhiḥ vasu
dhā bhuktā rājabhiḥ sagarādibhiḥ . yasya yasya yadā bhūmi(nā) tasya tasya tadā phaḷa © kaṁda © vēdavida rvvaiṣṇavadharmmōda
yarakaḷaṁkacaratarinnūrvvarumatyādaradi śivālayadī mēdiniya sarvvamānyadiṁ pālisuvar . © Ī sthānakke mahā
janaṁ brahmacaryyamuḷḷa tapasviyaṁ nilisuvar brahmacaryyamilladananirddōḍisi kaḷevar . vṛttaṁ © dakṣiṇagaṁgeya
dvijasamūhada percida vēdaghōṣadiṁdakṣayamoḷpuvetta kuruvattiya satprabhu dharmmacittadāpēkṣeyo
ḷīsvarālayake ke neya gōtraviddhiyindakṣateyikkidardvijaridēṁ kritapuṇyanō maṁtrimāṇika . ©
dharaṇīndvaṁbarameyda saptataḷamaṁ taḷtattu rmmadhyaṁdī naralōkaṁ himasētumandaramumaṁ koṁbotti su
ttiṟduvā suralōkaṁgaḷinattajāṇḍataṭadoḷkīrttirllatāvalli vistaradiṁparvvidī kāḷidāsanēṁ mahāsatvaṁ yasōbhā
giyō . © kanda © śrīkāḷidāsananujaṁ lōkatrayabandhu guṇagaṇānvitanamaḻaṁ dēkaṁge mēcikaṁge sadākālaṁ va
radanakke dēvaradēvaṁ . Aṟidāgamōktiyindaṁ niṟisi śivajyōtiyaṁ svacittade gatiyaṁ meṟeyade saccāritrade ku
ṟuvattiya cillukāryyamuni manucaritaṁ . © sāmānyōyaṁ dharmmasēturnṛpāṇāṁ kālē kālē pālanīyō bhavadbhiḥ
sarvvānētāṁ bhāginaḥ pārtthivēndrānbhūyō bhūyō yācatē rāmabhadraḥ . ślōkaṁ . jīyāddhārītiputtrāṇāṁ . mā
navyānāṁ sagōtrataḥ . satyāśrayakuḷōdbhāśi . dharmapālō mahīpatiḥ © kandaṁ . jagadēkamallatanayaṁ . ne
gaḻdaṁ cāḷukyatiḷakanāhavamallaṁ . gaganēndudinakarāṁbudhiyugamuḷḷinamūrgge paṁcarasamam biṭṭaṁ . ©
paramēsvaradattiyanādaradindārkkādaravara māḍida dharmmaṁ . Arasāḷtanadiṁduṁḍarssurabhiyumaṁ dvijarana
ḷida pātakarappar . baydaṁge paṇamumoṁduṁ poydaṁgāṟupaṇamiṟiye panneraḍu paṇaṁ pāyaṟade su
rigegirttiradeydidavaṁgeṁṭu paṇame daṇḍaṁ nirutaṁ . Āṇeyane mikku pōdaḍe māṇade koṭṭeraḍu paṇa
mivaṁ keṟegittaṁ kṣōṇipati mikka daṇḍaṁ jāṇenarasiṁgidūrgge māḍida sameyaṁ . ślōka © svadattaṁ paradattaṁ vā yō harē
ti vasundharāṁṣaṣṭirvvariṣasahasrāṇi vviṣṭāyāṁjāyatē krimiḥ © śrīsuranadimandiragiriyāsasiravi
tatigaḷuḷḷinamintī sāsanada siḷāstaṁbhaṁ bhāsurataramāge nilke vasudhātaḷadoḷ . © vṛtta © yāvadvīcītaraṁga
vahati girinadī jāhnavī pūrṇnatōyaṁ yāvadvākāsamārggē . pathati suravaraiścaṁdratārārkkakālaiḥ . yāvadbrā
hmaṇyaviṣṇussurapatisahitaṁ triṣṭatē mēruśriṁgē tāvadvaḥ putrapautraṁ svajanaparivritaṁ vardatē rājala[kṣmīḥ .]
© Eḷegesaya kāḷigānkana kuḷamīkriti negaḷe nāgavāraṁ pēḻdeṁ . siḷasāsanadoḷu manumunigaḷa vā
kyamanaṟiye nāgamma baredaṁ . © Amadarapavādasankitaramitayasarnnīḷakaṇṭhapadayugakama labhrama
rī cillukāryyanaṁ bhuvanabhavanamenituṁṭanituṁ maṁgaḷamattyūrjjitamūriṁgaṁ śrīkāḷidāsaṁgō
jisutirpparasiṁgaṁ sāsanamanosedu koṭṭavarggellaṁ . © kallabesaṁgaḷanarivavarellaṁ kaikoṇḍu poga
ne cāvuṇḍōjaṁgallade peṟarggōvajavesaradēnoppugume © śrījayābhivṛddhi rbhavatāt .
